commands.review_summary:
The PR reclassifies Cloudflare-like 403 HTML provider failures as `upstream_html` and changes Codex ChatGPT model calls plus WHAM usage probes to send browser-like request headers.

PR surface: Source +33, Tests +11. Total +44 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live end-to-end reproduction was established in this read-only review. The classifier boundary is source-reproducible because current main maps status-403 HTML to `auth_html`, and the linked issue supplies the observed Cloudflare challenge text.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human handling remains because the contributor must supply live provider-path proof and maintainers must choose whether browser-like Codex headers are acceptable.
